policy.sameSegment: Beaches in the same curated shoreline segment should render the same visible exposure level unless a verified local morphology or wind-sport exception locks a stricter level.
policy.confidence: Segment propagation may support map-color consistency and medium review, but it never creates high confidence by itself.

segments.notes: Agia Anna, Agios Prokopios, and Plaka sit on the same west resort beach-front and should not diverge without a specific geometry reason.
Orkos and Mikri Vigla share the exposed west wind-front. Mikri Vigla wind-sport behavior can lock a stricter exposure, while the separate south side remains outside this segment.
Kastraki, Glyfada, Alyko, Kedros, Mikro Alyko, Hawaii, and Pyrgaki are adjacent southwest coast pockets with similar shoreline facing; small coves remain lower confidence until separately verified.
Klidos and Paralia Klido are adjacent southeast/east cove records and should not diverge without a specific geometry reason.
Limnari and Lionas sit on the same east/northeast bay system; nearby verified map evidence can support medium consistency, not high confidence.
Rina and Spedo are neighboring southeast/south cove records with similar facing; access and exact shelter remain separately audited.
Ammitis, Glatza, Mikra, and Chilia Vrysi are north/northwest rocky-front records with similar exposure behavior.
